name: Coder
description: Your AI coding agent for any GitHub repo. Import a repository, and the agent runs a coding CLI (Claude Code / Gemini / Codex) on your own machine — you drive it from anywhere or hand it an objective and let it work autonomously, with live takeover when it gets stuck.

notes: Repo-agnostic: works on ANY GitHub repo the subscriber owns — not the platform itself.
Hands run locally via `pags up` (tmux + the coding CLI); the brain is the CodingSessionWorkflow.
Repos + sessions are stored per-instance in D1 (coding_repos / coding_sessions), not DO collections.
